price: Sind die Ungläubigen nicht doch belohnt worden für das, was sie zu tun pflegten?
arabic: هَلۡ ثُوِّبَ ٱلۡكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُواْ يَفۡعَلُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: hal thuwwiba al-kufāru mā kānū yafʿalūna
